property.name: java.library.path
property.value: D:\maven project\Automation Testing\eclipse\plugins\org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.9.v20251105-0741\jre\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files (x86)\TRICENTIS\Tosca Testsuite\ToscaCommander;;C:\oraclexe\app\oracle\product\10.2.0\server\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Python312\;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\kubectl;C:\minikube;C:\terraform;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Users\Satyajit\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.15-bin\apache-maven-3.9.15\bin\bin;C:\Users\Satyajit\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Satyajit\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Satyajit\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: TestFacebook

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 114 Current browser version is 147.0.7727.102 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-1DN2SJJ', ip: '172.19.176.1' Build info: version: '4.20.0', revision: '866c76ca80' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--remote-allow-origins=*], extensions: []}}]}]
